meaning: 米德尔斯布勒[英国英格兰东北部港市](克利夫兰郡首府)
examples: The river that runs through Middlesbrough became ugly on the eye and hard on the nose.
Johnson will miss this weekend's FA Cup tie with Stoke City after playing against Manchester City in Middlesbrough in the third round.
Take Middlesbrough, a city in the northern Teesside conurbation.
He is a very stable guy and I wouldn't be worried about Middlesbrough at all.
Viv Anderson, assistant to Robson at Middlesbrough, believes Robson will prove his doubters wrong.
